{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323173137006D29F8D3D7AC24254A"}"},"total":4818},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7123867974909936396","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很好，值得一看。作者对人物的描写很形象，通过独特的言谈举止写出了独特的人物性格，使之气韵生动，活灵活现，跃然纸上。字里行间让你看到的是一个真实、袒露的灵魂。很喜欢女主的大局观以及独特的思考方式，处理方式理智又果断，很爱这种女强文啊。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658654881,"group_id":"7103528837228530721","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwIavfhhNtc4BkBUx13jon2mUKB4Vpl8iKhSZ8pteOHl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0022cda9ccad44b0843a4714c9abf21d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795430&x-signature=eI5ADor%2FzognmjA0ei003N8rFIs%3D","user_id":"3535640881292056","user_name":"叶绫霏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3535640881292056","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1665120760,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7103528837228530721","book_info":{"abstract":"【已完结❤️】穿越+1v1+女强男弱+强制+女扮男装+女主杀伐果断狠辣无情vs男主隐忍内敛美强惨
【避雷：女强男弱！！！】
上市集团高管凤瑾一朝猝死，穿越到了女扮男装暴虐无道的神经病太子身上。
开局美男献身，跪着求她开恩，暗搓搓却想弄死她。
抱歉了，太子之位是她的，江山也是她的！
文明社会，谁想不文明，她第一个不答应！
